description: Integrated form field that wraps TmTextInput with automatic EditContext validation, showing error messages and validation icons. Includes label, help text, and required indicator.

examples.title: Validated text field inside EditForm
examples.code:
<EditForm Model="@model">
    <DataAnnotationsValidator />
    <TmValidatedField Label="Email" @bind-Value="model.Email"
        Placeholder="user@example.com" Required="true"
        HelpText="We will never share your email." LeftIcon="mail" />
</EditForm>
